bayes2stage 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

bds_design()
Set x to missing based on an BDS design
cantor_seed()
Generate a unique seed from two indices using Cantor pairing
check_cols()
Check for required columns in a data frame
diagnose_fit()
Comprehensive MCMC diagnostics
ellipse_design()
Set x to missing based on an ellipse design
fit_acml_ods()
Fit ACML model for outcome-dependent sampling
fit_stan_model()
Fit a Bayesian two-stage model using Stan
format_data_mcmc()
Format the simulated data for Stan
generate_data()
Generate correlated random intercept / slope longitudinal data
get_key_parameters()
Get default key parameters for diagnostics
get_parameter_registry()
Get parameter registry with all name mappings
mcmc_diagnostics
MCMC Diagnostic Plots
mcmc_forest()
Create a forest plot of MCMC output
mcmc_trace()
Plot MCMC trace plots
model_summary()
Extract summary statistics from model fit objects
ods_design()
Set x to missing based on an ODS design
parameter_registry
Parameter Registry
plot_data()
Plot simulated data
plot_density()
Density plots with chain overlay
plot_energy()
Energy diagnostic plot (NUTS-specific)
plot_forest()
Forest plot with table-style annotations
plot_funnel()
Quick funnel diagnostic for hierarchical parameters
plot_intervals()
Posterior interval plots
plot_pairs()
Pairs plots for diagnosing posterior geometry
plot_parcoord()
Parallel coordinates plot for diagnosing divergences
plot_rank()
Rank histogram plots for convergence diagnostics
plot_trace()
Trace plots for MCMC diagnostics
ppc_imputation()
Posterior Predictive Checks for Imputation Model
ppc_imputation_bernoulli()
PPC for Bernoulli imputation model
ppc_imputation_beta_binomial()
PPC for beta-binomial imputation model
ppc_imputation_count()
PPC for count imputation model (negative binomial)
ppc_imputation_density()
Posterior predictive density check for imputation model
ppc_imputation_intervals()
Check prediction interval coverage
ppc_imputation_mean_diagnostics()
Mean model diagnostics for normal imputation
ppc_imputation_residuals()
Residual diagnostics for normal imputation model
ppc_imputation_stat()
Posterior predictive check for a summary statistic
print(<bayes2stage_diagnostics>)
Print method for bayes2stage diagnostics
print(<ppc_imputation>)
Print method for ppc_imputation results
set_missing()
Given selected subjects, set X to missing for those not selected
srs_design()
Set x to missing based on an SRS design
translate_parameter_names()
Translate parameter names between contexts

Developed by Maximilian Rohde.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
